summary: Video set to music with no speech. An armored BearCat vehicle drives across snow, agents in tactical gear stage inside a vehicle (one vest reads 'BORTAC'), an agent moves through a doorway, and a red title card reads '1,000+ SIGNED PARTNERSHIPS WITH LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT'. It ends on a close-up of a gold HSI badge beside a black pistol.

script.scene: A dark-green armored BearCat tactical vehicle drives across a snowy, fenced compound under gray skies.
Low-angle shot of geared-up operators' legs and rifles; bold red animated stat overlay '1,000+' with 'SIGNED PARTNERSHIPS WITH LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT.'
Interior of an armored vehicle with masked agents in camouflage (one vest reads 'BORTAC') holding rifles.
An agent in a 'POLICE / Homeland Security Investigations' vest moves through an interior doorway.
Cinematic macro close-up of a gold HSI/federal agent badge lying beside a holstered/black pistol.

notable_text: SIGNED PARTNERSHIPS WITH LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT
ICE had a busy year, but the work is just getting started.
